title: Add Automations to Dashboards

posts.author: SKehoe (Scott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Would like to see it possible to add Automations to Dashboards - For example, you can set a value - When X reached, notifies So and So, or when Value reached Y, then create item.

What are you trying to achieve

Be able to make data driven decisions without having to check a board daily, and can have it automate the process
